thought.text: 需要重新运行 cmake 来更新文件列表：

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && rm -rf build && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build . -t task4 2>&1 | tail -20

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && rm -rf build && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build . -t task4 2>&1 | tail -20", "summary": "Rebuild task4 from scratch"}
